summary: Fixed 3 test isolation failures (hot-reload.test.js process.exit crash, m13-dbb.test.js DBB-008 null assertion, m28-profiles-cache.test.js version mismatch). All caused by cross-test globalThis.fetch contamination. Rewrote hot-reload.test.js to use vitest APIs with vi.resetModules() + dynamic imports, added afterEach fetch restoration in m13-dbb.test.js. All 169 test files pass (910 tests, 0 failures). No developer tasks available to claim — only remaining task is architect-owned VISION.md update.
